question: Will The Gameoverse Pilot reach 25 million views by the end of June?
reason: Gameoverse Pilot amassed 10 million views within three days of release.
evidence: The pilot episode of Gameoverse was released on May 15, 2026.
By May 18, 2026, it had garnered 10 million views.
The official GLITCH Productions Twitter account announced the milestone on May 19, 2026.
